progressBar.heading: Progress bar
progressBar.text: The progress bar represents recieved value and can be active or cancelled.

empty.heading: Empty progress bar
empty.text: A progress bar at 0% showing the initial not-started state, where only the track is visible.

complete.heading: Completed progress
complete.text: A progress bar at 100% representing a fully completed process.

cancelled-empty.heading: Cancelled before start
cancelled-empty.text: A progress bar with isCancelled set to true and value at 0%, representing a process that was cancelled before any progress was made.
